allOf.description: An object that represents a local file certificate. The certificate must meet specific requirements and you must have proxy authorization enabled. For more information, see Transport Layer Security (TLS) .
A reference to an object that represents a virtual gateway's client's Secret Discovery Service certificate.

description: An object that represents the virtual gateway's client's Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate.
title: VirtualGatewayClientTlsCertificate
